steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks which choice best emphasizes Atitalaquia’s size. Only one note provides a concrete measurement: Atitalaquia covers roughly 63 km².

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — ‘Providing street lighting is just one example of the public services that municipalities provide.’: discusses public services — says nothing about size. ✗
  • Choice B — ‘Atitalaquia is one of 84 governmental regions, known as municipalities, across Hidalgo.’: compares Atitalaquia to other municipalities — no area figure given. ✗
  • Choice C — ‘Atitalaquia—a governmental region in the state of Hidalgo, Mexico—provides many public services to its residents.’: describes services provided — no mention of size. ✗
  • Choice D — ‘The municipality of Atitalaquia in Hidalgo, Mexico, covers an area of roughly 63 km².’: directly states the 63 km² area, making size concrete and explicit. ✓
That confirms D is correct.
